title: Security Lead (Google Cloud / Network / Kubernetes)
description:
• Design, implement, and oversee physical, information, and operational security to protect people, assets, data, and facilities.
  • Lead Google Distributed Cloud (GDC) deployments, preferably in air-gapped environments, including ongoing operations.
  • Deploy and operate Kubernetes platforms in secure, regulated environments.
  • Define and enforce security policies, risk management frameworks, and compliance controls.
  • Conduct risk assessments, audits, vulnerability analysis, and drive remediation actions.
  • Lead security incident response, investigations, and crisis management.
  • Collaborate with IT, compliance teams, and manage third-party vendors and security systems.
  • Deliver security awareness and technical training to stakeholders.
  • Ensure compliance with local laws, regulatory, and industry standards.

Key Skills & Qualifications

  • Strong hands-on experience with Google Distributed Cloud, Linux, networking (switches, firewalls), and NetApp storage.
  • Experience with Kubernetes deployment and operations.
  • Solid background in security operations, risk management, and incident response.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Computing or related field.
  • Google Professional Cloud Architect and GDC air-gapped deployment training preferred.
